builder.cmdDescrp: Manage Discord AutoMod rules, templates, and backups

apply.descrp: Apply a template to set up AutoMod rules

backup.descrp: Backup all AutoMod rules as JSON
Export all AutoMod rules as a JSON file

restore.descrp: Restore AutoMod rules from a JSON attachment

keyword.descrp: Manage keywords in an AutoMod rule

add.descrp: Add a keyword to an AutoMod rule
add.rule: The rule to add the keyword to

remove.descrp: Remove a keyword from an AutoMod rule
remove.rule: The rule to remove the keyword from

regex.descrp: Manage regex patterns in an AutoMod rule

add.descrp: Add a regex pattern to an AutoMod rule
add.rule: The rule to add the pattern to
add.pattern: The regex pattern to add (max 75 characters)

remove.descrp: Remove a regex pattern from an AutoMod rule
remove.rule: The rule to remove the pattern from

exempt.descrp: Manage exemptions for an AutoMod rule

add.descrp: Add a role or channel exemption to an AutoMod rule
add.rule: The rule to add the exemption to

remove.descrp: Remove a role or channel exemption from an AutoMod rule
remove.rule: The rule to remove the exemption from

create.title: AutoMod Rule Created
create.limitReached: This server has reached the maximum of 6 AutoMod rules. Delete a rule before creating a new one.
create.nameRequired: Please provide a name for the rule.

edit.namePlaceholder: Enter a new name for this rule
edit.title: AutoMod Rule Updated
edit.notFound: AutoMod rule not found. It may have been deleted.

delete.title: AutoMod Rule Deleted
delete.notFound: AutoMod rule not found. It may have already been deleted.
delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the AutoMod rule **{0}**? This cannot be undone.

list.title: AutoMod Rules
list.empty: No AutoMod rules configured. Use `/automod rule create` or `/automod template apply` to get started.

template.title: AutoMod Template Applied
template.notFound: Template not found. Available templates: anti-spam, anti-phishing, family-friendly, gaming.
template.wouldExceedLimit: Applying this template would exceed the 6-rule limit. This template creates {0} rule(s), but you only have {1} slot(s) available. Delete some rules first.
template.partialSuccess: Applied the **{0}** template partially. {1} of {2} rules created (hit 6-rule limit).

backup.title: AutoMod Backup
backup.success: AutoMod rules have been exported. Check your DMs for the backup file.
backup.dmFailed: Could not send backup via DM. Please enable DMs from server members.

restore.title: AutoMod Rules Restored
restore.noAttachment: Please attach a JSON file containing AutoMod rules.
restore.invalidJson: The attached file is not valid JSON. Please use a backup file created with `/automod backup`.
restore.invalidFormat: The backup file format is invalid. Please use a backup file created with `/automod backup`.
restore.wouldExceedLimit: Restoring would create {0} rule(s), but you only have {1} slot(s) available. Delete some rules first.
restore.confirmMessage: This will create {0} new AutoMod rule(s). Existing rules will NOT be deleted. Continue?

add.limitReached: This rule has reached the maximum of 1,000 keywords.
add.alreadyExists: Keyword `{0}` already exists in this rule.
add.ruleNotKeyword: This rule is not a keyword filter. Keywords can only be added to keyword filter rules.

remove.notFound: Keyword `{0}` was not found in this rule.
remove.ruleNotKeyword: This rule is not a keyword filter.

add.limitReached: This rule has reached the maximum of 10 regex patterns.
add.tooLong: Regex patterns must be 75 characters or fewer. Your pattern is {0} characters.
add.alreadyExists: This regex pattern already exists in this rule.
add.ruleNotKeyword: Regex patterns can only be added to keyword filter rules.
add.invalid: Invalid regex pattern. Please check the syntax.

remove.notFound: Regex pattern not found in this rule.
remove.ruleNotKeyword: This rule is not a keyword filter.

regex.error: Failed to manage AutoMod regex patterns.

add.alreadyExempt: This role or channel is already exempt from this rule.
add.specifyRoleOrChannel: Please specify a role or channel to exempt.

remove.notExempt: This role or channel is not exempt from this rule.
remove.specifyRoleOrChannel: Please specify a role or channel to un-exempt.

error.ruleNotFound: AutoMod rule not found. It may have been deleted.
error.noPermission: The bot needs **Manage Guild** permission to manage AutoMod rules.
error.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch AutoMod rules from Discord.
